title: Kid and Law Challenge Big Mom
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Marco, Unknown person #12, King as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that thing? supposed to be pulled back like that.?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I couldn't block it? It's like a team!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's how pterandodons hunted their prey!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I can't find a way to reach him,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I suppose pteranodons flew with fire on their backs too?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That bastard's talking down to me....! I've gotta knock him outta the sky before I run out of steam!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
